name: @parcha/desloppify-skill
description: Portable evidence-backed codebase cleanup with Peter O'Malley's official Desloppify engine

scripts.test: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v && python3 -m py_compile skills/desloppify/scripts/desloppify_portable.py && python3 -m json.tool .claude-plugin/plugin.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .codex-plugin/plugin.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .agents/plugins/marketplace.json >/dev/null && python3 scripts/check_package.py

author: Parcha Labs (https://parcha.com)
